case_title: KYAW KYAW SAN VS. YING SHAO ZHENG

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $0.00) SERVED SEP-26-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ZHENG, YING SHAO

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN, KYAW KYAW ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,000.00 FILED BY SAN, KYAW KYAW AS TO DEFENDANT ZHENG, YING SHAO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-22-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF KYAW KYAW IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT YING SHAO ZHENG IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER REBECCA CHOU. THE COURT ORDERS DEFENDANT YING SHAO ZHENG TO GIVE TO KYAW KYAW SAN IN OPEN COURT CASHIER CHECK #7489102574 FOR $4000 PAYABLE TO KYAW KYAW SAN AND TO ALSO GIVE TO KYAW KYAW SAN IN OPEN COURT CASHIER CHECK #7489102578 FOR $4000 PAYABLE TO SH INTERNATIONAL. BECAUSE OF THESE PAYMENTS CASE WILL END. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
